title: 2021 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This Federal Reserve website page serves as an index to all 2021 FOMC press releases and economic projections, listing 12 FOMC statement dates and 4 economic projections releases throughout the year. The page is a navigation/listing page that provides links to individual documents rather than containing the substantive content of any FOMC statement itself. It does not archive well as a standalone research note because it contains no detailed policy content, only metadata about documents that exist elsewhere.
key_points: This is a listing page indexing 2021 FOMC press releases, not a single archival document
Lists 12 FOMC statement dates spanning January through December 2021: 1/27, 3/17, 4/28, 6/16, 7/28, 9/22, 11/3, and 12/15
Lists 4 economic projections releases from March, June, September, and December 2021 FOMC meetings
Page last updated February 26, 2026; content pertains to 2021 events over 4 years ago
Contains a Statement Regarding Repurchase Agreement Arrangements dated 7/28/2021
Contains a reaffirmation of the Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy dated 1/27/2021
The page itself contains no substantive policy content, only links to individual press releases
why_it_matters: This page is not useful as a standalone research archive entry. It is a navigation index that references multiple FOMC documents from 2021. To properly capture the 2021 Fed policy decisions for research purposes, each individual FOMC statement should be archived separately rather than this aggregate listing page.
macro_context: The page references historical 2021 FOMC meetings during a period when the Fed was transitioning from pandemic-era accommodation to tighter policy, but provides no substantive policy content to analyze.

issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page (source_type correctly identified) - contains only an index of links to individual documents, no substantive policy content
event_type set to 'unknown' - appropriate given the page is not a discrete event but an aggregate index, however this confirms the record lacks a specific FOMC event to archive
The source has no archival value as a standalone research record - it merely lists metadata about other documents that should be archived individually
PUBLISHED_AT (2026-02-26) reflects page last update, but content pertains to 2021 FOMC meetings (over 4 years old relative to TODAY 2026-03-31)
Important numbers [12, 4] in the record are metadata counts from the listing, not substantive market-relevant data

notes: Source is a navigation/listing page rather than an archival document. Per Rule 6, listing pages should be treated as non-archiveable. The page lists links to 2021 FOMC statements and economic projections but contains no substantive content from those documents. Individual FOMC statements from 2021 should be archived separately if needed. The 'Last Update: February 26, 2026' date suggests this is a live web page, but the content it describes (2021 FOMC meetings) is historical. This record serves only as evidence that the index exists and what it contains, not as a substantive source.
